title: 'Adivasi-Birodhi Mindset': TMC Alleges Hemant Soren Denied Permission to Land in Jhargram Amid PM Modi's Jhalmuri Break
description: Trinamool Congress accused PM Modi of humiliating tribal leaders after Jharkhand CM Hemant Soren and MLA Kalpana Soren were denied permission to fly into Jhargram while Modi extended his stay to eat Jhalmuri.
